prose:
Water frontier-orbital HOMO–LUMO gap — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: input coordinates from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz` (n_atoms = 3: O, H, H); single-point calculation, not relaxed. SCF converged in 7 cycles. HOMO = −8.6037 eV, LUMO = +0.3370 eV → gap = 8.9407 eV. Koopmans-approximated ionization potential 8.604 eV, electron affinity −0.337 eV (electron-deficient). Command: `chemkit frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz`.</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
